revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[標式遺跡]] ([[:en:Category:Archaeological type sites|Archaeological type sites]])に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:ひようしきいせき}…」

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
revision.text:
==English Content== [[Type site]] is the main article for this category, and contains a short list of some of the more notable ones.
This category was nominated for deletion in 2020; the result of discussion at [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2020_December_13#Category:Archaeological_type_sites]] was that it would be kept.
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[bn:Category:প্রত্নতত্ত্ব জাতীয় স্থান]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:প্রত্নতত্ত্ব জাতীয় স্থান]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[en:Archaeological type sites]] [[en:Category:Archaeological type sites]] [[en:Category:Category:Archaeological type sites]] [[ja:Category:Category:標式遺跡]] [[ja:Category:標式遺跡]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の標式遺跡]] [[vi:Category:Thể loại:Địa điểm khảo cổ điển hình]] [[vi:Category:Địa điểm khảo cổ điển hình]]
==Local Content== [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]

==English Content== [[Type site]] is the main article for this category, and contains a short list of some of the more notable ones.
This category was nominated for deletion in 2020; the result of discussion at [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2020_December_13#Category:Archaeological_type_sites]] was that it would be kept. [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
==English Content== [[Type site]] is the main article for this category, and contains a short list of some of the more notable ones.
This category was nominated for deletion in 2020; the result of discussion at [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2020_December_13#Category:Archaeological_type_sites]] was that it would be kept. [[bn:Category:প্রত্নতত্ত্ব জাতীয় স্থান]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:প্রত্নতত্ত্ব জাতীয় স্থান]] [[en:Archaeological type sites]] [[en:Category:Archaeological type sites]] [[en:Category:Archaeological type sites]] [[ja:Category:標式遺跡]] [[ja:Category:標式遺跡]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の標式遺跡]] [[vi:Category:Thể loại:Địa điểm khảo cổ điển hình]] [[vi:Category:Địa điểm khảo cổ điển hình]]
==Local Content==
{{wikidata link|Q15147798}} {{wikidata link|Q15147798}}
